title: Lovely Light Mediterranean Lamb Kebabs
description: Umami and energizing Mediterranean dish featuring lamb kebabs with a miso marinade, red bell peppers, and ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly ingredients, perfect for a light dinner
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together miso paste, lemon juice, olive oil, red food coloring, salt, and black pepper to make the marinade.
Add the lamb cubes to the marinade and mix well to coat, then cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated lamb cubes, red bell pepper, and onion onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the lamb is cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
Let the kebabs rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with fresh parsley and a side of quinoa or couscous.
Refrigerate or freeze any leftovers for up to 3 days.
